processModel.serverExecution: Vite runs in the measured host Node process

singleTargetBaseline.measurementBoundary: Process and cache snapshots run outside timed browser batches; shared Playwright cache is report-only.

changedCapabilityHotPath.budgetBasis: Fixed at 2 seconds after measured one-scenario p95, preserving material headroom without changing the separate 30-second 20-scenario gate.

commandAudit.boundary: Every external command issued by the measured changed-capability path; stability browser batches issue no external commands.
